$comments.extends: recommended base + semantic commits + known monorepo package groupings
$comments.rangeStrategy: bump rewrites the pinned version in package.json, not just the lockfile
$comments.postUpdateOptions: runs pnpm dedupe after every update to collapse duplicate transitive deps
$comments.schedule: creates PRs during business hours only :: prevents off-hours dashboard floods
$comments.prConcurrentLimit: max open Renovate PRs at any time
$comments.prHourlyLimit: max new PRs per hour per run
$comments.lockFileMaintenance: weekly full pnpm install to catch indirect dep drift; pnpmDedupe also runs here
$comments.minimumReleaseAge: cooldown before acting :: lets the ecosystem catch yanked or broken releases

packageRules.description: patch :: group all, automerge via platform merge queue after 3-day cooldown
dev minor :: automerge but not via platform :: allows sanity check on e.g. new lint rules
prod minor :: PR only, 5-day cooldown :: behavioral changes may affect users
major :: manual review required, deprioritized in dashboard
pnpm catalog :: exact pins have no range so replace is used instead of bump
